ddls:
CREATE TABLE "index_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the managed index policy */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index this policy is managing */,
  "index_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the managed index */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the policy is enabled */,
  "enabled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last enabled */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the policy */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the policy */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the policy is a default policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_policies_index_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("index_uuid") REFERENCES indices ("index_uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_policies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_policies_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the index */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the index was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the index */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the index */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the index in bytes */,
  "shard_count" INTEGER /* Number of shards in the index */,
  "replica_count" INTEGER /* Number of replicas for the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the action was performed on */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the policy (e.g., enabled, disabled, modified) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_history_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES index_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy this configuration belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_configurations_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES index_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the policy management */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., view, modify, enable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the policy management */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES index_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, error, update) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES index_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
